title: Savory Sweet Japanese Chicken Mochi
description: A fresh and crisp Japanese dish featuring ginger garlic paste and pickle, high in protein and easy to make, formed into mochi.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together mochi flour and water until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape.
In a large skillet, heat sesame oil over medium heat and cook the chicken breast until cooked through.
Shred the cooked chicken into small pieces and mix with ginger garlic paste, Japanese pickle, salt, and black pepper.
Place a tablespoon of the chicken mixture onto the center of each mochi disk.
Fold the mochi over the filling and press the edges together to seal.
Serve the mochi warm or at room temperature.
